acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects findings[] entries whose node_id is blank, missing, or does not match a node in roadmap/qd-export.json.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: validate_roadmap_finding_node_ids builds a node id index from roadmap/qd-export.json and reports blank, missing, or unknown finding node IDs. The temporary-copy negative smoke logs record blank and unknown node_id rejections.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects unknown findings[].severity values outside P0, P1, P2, P3.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: validate_roadmap_record_values rejects any finding severity outside P0, P1, P2, and P3. The temporary-copy severity smoke log records severity=P4 failing as expected.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects unknown findings[].status values outside open, resolved, promoted.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: validate_roadmap_record_values rejects any finding status outside open, resolved, and promoted. The temporary-copy status smoke log records status=deferred failing as expected.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Current reports/export pass the stricter check.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-finding-schema-contract/qd-reports-check.log records just qd-reports-check passing with current reports and roadmap export.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Required evidence logs are recorded under evidence/m4-qd-finding-schema-contract.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The evidence directory contains qd-reports-check.log, just-check.log, four negative smoke logs, and git-diff-check.log.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Completion and audit reports use the matching nodeId and leave commits[] empty.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: reports/qd/m4-qd-finding-schema-contract/completion.json and audit.json use nodeId=m4-qd-finding-schema-contract; completion commits[] is empty for pre-merge local reporting.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; Linux command evidence is recorded and no macOS-specific validation is required or claimed.
